# Project Constitution

## Purpose

This document defines durable principles, guardrails, and quality gates for [PROJECT NAME].
Update this once per project—it guides all subsequent development decisions and constrains AI agent behavior.

This is the **source of truth** for what "done" means.

- repositories, services, or packages in scope

- when it overrides temporary instructions
